title: Why we picked LangChain over LlamaIndex
snippet: Migrated from LlamaIndex to LangChain last sprint. Performance and DX improvements are real but onboarding ramp was steeper.
body: Migrated from LlamaIndex to LangChain last sprint. Performance and DX improvements are real but onboarding ramp was steeper.
author: dev.bsky.social1

title: LlamaIndex still has the edge for llm-framework workflows
snippet: Tried LangChain for a month. LlamaIndex's ecosystem and reliability still win for production llm-framework workloads.
body: Tried LangChain for a month. LlamaIndex's ecosystem and reliability still win for production llm-framework workloads.
author: dev.bsky.social2
